result.stdout:
Started
Usage:  [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                Show help information
  -ot|--operationType <TYPE>  Can either be [command] or [query]
  -c|--concern <NAME>         Name of the concern
  -o|--operation <NAME>       Name of the operation
  -g|--groupBy <TYPE>         Group domain objects by [C] for concerns or [O]
                              for operations, defaults to concerns

commands.payload:
Started
Usage:  [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                Show help information
  -ot|--operationType <TYPE>  Can either be [command] or [query]
  -c|--concern <NAME>         Name of the concern
  -o|--operation <NAME>       Name of the operation
  -g|--groupBy <TYPE>         Group domain objects by [C] for concerns or [O]
                              for operations, defaults to concerns
